course_title: INTRODUCTION TO COLLOID AND INTERFACE SCIENCE
description: Introduction to topics in colloid and interface science, including sedimentation and diffusion, solution thermodynamics, rheology, light scattering, surface tension and contact angle, adsorption, association colloids, particle interactions, electrokinetics, and colloidal stability.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (CBE 311,CHEM 561, or562), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (CBE 311,CHEM 561, or562), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
